raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$140.00} for a Best Buy car audio installation service ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) that was never performed. I purchased multiple car audio items and installation services on XX/XX/XXXX, then returned all equipment and canceled all services on XX/XX/XXXX. 

Best Buy refunded XXXX instance of this service SKU, but the transaction originally included XXXX identical charges. Only XXXX was refunded. The second XXXX XXXX service was left active in their system even though no installation ever occurred. 

I attempted to resolve this with both Best Buy and Citi multiple times. Best Buy can not provide documentation showing the service was performed because it was not. Citi representatives told me they could not identify the charge, but the charge still appears on my Best Buy Citi card statement covering XXXX XXXX. 

I am requesting that Citi permanently remove the remaining {$140.00} charge under the Fair Credit Billing Act, as this was a duplicate service charge for a service that was never fulfilled.
